weekly_summary: Over the past 7 days, our security landscape has been characterized by 21 total findings across 9 unique CVEs, with each of the tracked vulnerabilities appearing only once. The active security domains have been diverse, encompassing AI and ML threats, containers and Kubernetes, crypto libraries, operating system and kernel vulnerabilities, as well as issues in npm, Node, PyPI, Python, supply chain, and web servers. Notably, the most active day was March 25, 2026, indicating a recent surge in security incidents that warrant continued monitoring and mitigation efforts to ensure the integrity of our infrastructure.
